title: 9ft Banner Happy 7th Birthday Pink Holographic Foil Pennant Age 7 (274cm)
features: FOR A BIG DAY -- Jazz your home for a big day!

INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE -- Made of durable long-lasting material this banner can be used both indoors and outdoors. Looks fantastic as a window decoration when the sunlight is caught by holographic reflections.
VERSATILE -- Can be used as one 2.7m banner or split into 3 smaller banners as the text is repeated 3 times.
EASY TO USE -- Just unfold and display in seconds.
Package contents: 7th Birthday Pink Birthday Party Foil Banner Pennant Age 7 x1, Envelope x1. Actual packaging may vary. The real color may be slightly different from the pictures.
description: This holographic 9ft pink banner is perfect for the 7th birthday party. It can be used both indoors and outdoors as the material is strong and durable. Holographic printing looks fantastic when it catches the sunlight, so the banner is a great choice for window decoration. Use it as one long banner or split into three parts - the text is repeated three times. Kindly note that items may slightly vary from the image. The banner is supplied in an envelope. This product is subject to specific safety warnings: Not suitable for children under 14 years. For use under adult supervision. To be used under the direct supervision of an adult.
